name: Yatta || Valentine's Day
description:
"It’s the rules of Official Candy Distribution Day!"

Toon Pov
---

Another while another bot that I just managed to somehow find the motivation to make and yes, I know this ain't a TF bot I want to branch out and try different things and try not to let get ashamed that this only has like under 100 chats/messages to it. I figured I might as well make a bot on some of my other interests, and I might as well just do one on dandy's world... Because it's my comfort game (as embarrassed I am to admit) and I want to keep this on the simpler side for the sake of me just doing this for the event.


And yes, Yatta is my favorite Dandy's world character how could you tell?

There are 2 greetings:
1. Yatta drops in on you (literally) to give you some chocolate and a card. (she may or may not have a secret crush on you)
2. You go to her room to give her some chocolate and she invites you in.


Update 2/2/26: made A Hopefully more appalling thumbnail with yatta art by: imhomeless
